creator: homer.yau@gmail.com
text:
Hi Alejandro,

Sorry for missing the archive.

There are some bugs I need to fix, as soon as I got the bug fix I will
attach the shell archive and send it to you.


Thanks,
Homer

On 10/5/06, Alejandro Pulver <alepulver@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Hello.
>
> It seems you have omitted or forgot the shell archive containing the
> new port.
>
> Could you please send a follow-up containing it?
>
> Best Regards,
> Ale
>
